title: Prediabetes review

investigations.text: Supports clinician review of age, BMI, prior gestational diabetes, laboratory trajectory, adverse-effect context and cardiovascular risk. Medication names, doses and treatment recommendations are excluded.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to clinician review of age, BMI, gestational history, laboratory trajectory and cardiovascular risk without recommending medicine.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of age, BMI, prior gestational diabetes, laboratory trajectory, adverse-effect context and cardiovascular risk. Medication names, doses and treatment recommendations are excluded.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 3.8–3.13 — individualized pharmacologic and cardiovascular-risk context

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up without establishing status or frequency automatically.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

follow_up.text: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant to documenting risk context, patient goals and discussions actually held without generating lifestyle advice.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 3.3–3.7 — person-centred risk and prevention discussion

sources_used.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States professional standard; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnostic test, value, date, trajectory, age, BMI, pregnancy, risk factors, comorbidities, goals and prior intervention are absent.
No prediabetes diagnosis, target, lifestyle programme, medicine, test or follow-up interval is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
